data.title: Family Care Center opens national TMS Center of Excellence in San Antonio, unveiled at an event on August 19.
data.description: On August 19, 2025, the national TMS Center of Excellence was inaugurated at the Stone Oak clinic in San Antonio by Family Care Center, a prominent provider of outpatient behavioral health services. This center represents a major advancement in their offerings and services.

data.title: Reykjavík Energy reports a profit of ISK 4.9 billion in first six months, strong financial position.
data.description: In the initial half of the year, Reykjavík Energy reported a profit amounting to ISK 4.9 billion, as confirmed in the company's reviewed interim consolidated financial reports authorized by the Board today. The corporate entity encompasses various subsidiaries including Veitur Utilities, ON Power, Reykjavík Fibre Network, and Carbfix.

data.title: Fulton Asset Management acquires AFCO Industries, manufacturer of building products and metal fabrication services. Founded in 1946, AFCO is based in Alexandria, Louisiana.
data.description: Fulton Asset Management, a family-backed investment platform, recently acquired AFCO Industries, Inc., a company based in Alexandria, Louisiana. AFCO, established in 1946, is a vertically integrated manufacturer specializing in aluminum, fiberglass, vinyl, and composite building products. Additionally, they offer CNC metal fabrication and contract manufacturing services. This move by FAM solidifies their focus on scaling legacy-rich industrial businesses.

data.title: Neo Sophia launches free AI autism screener app, based on M-CHAT-R guidelines. Provides instant results at home.
data.description: A newly revamped screening tool, proven effective in clinical settings, has been modified for parental use with artificial intelligence assistance and immediate outcomes in the comfort of home. Recently unveiled by Neo Sophia on August 25, 2025 in Atlanta, the innovative Screener mobile application now allows parents to conduct the renowned M-CHAT-R autism screening for their children at no cost. This advancement aims to enhance accessibility and efficiency, offering prompt results to users.

data.title: Inventor from Ajax, Canada creates E C SQUEEZE - a device to quickly squeeze water from mop head, reduces  physical stress.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 25, 2025, an inventor from Ajax, ON, Canada, shared details about the creation of the E C SQUEEZE device. The inventor aimed to streamline the process of squeezing water from a mop head within seconds. By developing this product, the inventor has successfully minimized physical strain and improved efficiency and cleanliness.

data.title: Societe Generale released details on transactions under a share buyback program.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This significant decrease comes alongside a noteworthy increase in job creation, with 250,000 new jobs being added to the economy last month. Additionally, the stock market saw a surge, with the main index rising by 5% in just one week. Experts attribute this positive trend to various factors, including increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. This data suggests a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery.

data.title: The Designery opens 5th NC location in South Charlotte. Grand opening event on Aug 27, 4-6 p.m. Owners Tim Gunnels and Craig Ausrud.
data.description: Tim Gunnels and Craig Ausrud, the owners of The Designery, will be celebrating the grand opening of their new showroom in Charlotte, North Carolina on August 27th from 4 to 6 p.m. The showroom is an immersive design center specializing in kitchen, bath, and closet designs, offering top-notch cabinets and countertops. The event is set to showcase their high-quality services and products to potential customers.

data.title: "North America Web App Firewall market to grow from USD 2.13B in 2024 to USD 6.65B by 2033 due to cybersecurity threats and web-based apps surge - ResearchAndMarkets.com"
data.description: A report titled "North America Web Application Firewall Market Size and Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Web Application Firewalls (WAF) in North America is projected to witness significant growth, with expectations to rise from USD 2.13 billion in 2024 to USD 6.65 billion by 2033. This surge in the market can be attributed to the increasing number of cybersecurity threats, a notable increase in web-based applications, and the enforcement of strict data protection regulations. Companies operating across various industries are likely to benefit from this growth trend.

data.title: Themes ETFs has relaunched the Humanoid Robotics ETF (Ticker: BOTT) on NASDAQ, offering exposure to leading robot companies with a low expense ratio of 0.35%.
data.description: A corporation based in Greenwich, Connecticut, disclosed on August 19, 2025, the re-launch of the Themes Humanoid Robotics ETF under the ticker symbol BOTT. This ETF aims to provide cost-effective investment opportunities in businesses spearheading the advancement of humanoid robots, autonomous technologies for various sectors like industry and logistics, healthcare support technologies, and the artificial intelligence and computing frameworks that power next-generation robotics. BOTT will be available for trading on NASDAQ with an exceptionally low expense ratio of 0.35%.

data.title: Inspira receives $27M order from African Ministry of Health for ART100 Systems, with full payment in 2025.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a leading innovator in life-support and diagnostic technologies based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed on August 19, 2025, that they have received a lucrative deal from a national ministry of health in Africa. The Ministry of Health has placed a substantial $27 million binding purchase order for Inspira’s FDA-cleared ART100 systems. This significant order was facilitated through Inspira’s exclusive distribution partner, responsible for the commercialization of the company’s products. The agreement marks the beginning of a comprehensive nationwide deployment initiative for these life-saving medical systems.

data.title: RealSense & NVIDIA partner to advance Physical AI for robotics, integrating RealSense AI depth cameras with NVIDIA Jetson Thor Series & Isaac Sim.
data.description: RealSense, Inc., a top company in robotic perception, revealed a new partnership with NVIDIA in San Francisco. This collaboration aims to enhance physical AI in humanoids and autonomous mobile robots. By combining RealSense's AI depth cameras with NVIDIA's robotics platforms like the NVIDIA Jetson Thor Series, they seek to boost the adoption and functionalities of robots. NVIDIA's Isaac Sim will also play a key role in creating digital twins for efficient testing. This move is expected to significantly advance the capabilities of AI in robotics.
